01
Background & Guam Agricultural Crisis
背景與關島農業現況危機

Climate change, shrinking arable land, and aging farming populations have severely reduced global agricultural output. Soil contamination, pesticide residues, heavy metals, and bacterial pathogens further compound the challenge of accessing safe, reliable food. These pressures are acutely felt in island economies that depend heavily on external resources — nowhere more so than in Guam.

近年全球天候異變、可耕地銳減、農耕人口老化，導致農業產量大幅萎縮。土壤污染、農藥殘留、重金屬及細菌病毒等食安問題持續惡化，使一般民眾難以穩定取得安全食物。對高度依賴外部資源的島嶼經濟體而言，此一處境格外嚴峻。

90%+
Food Imported
食品仰賴進口
Source: UOG Center for Island Sustainability; farmingIQ, Mar 2026
583
Total Farms (2023)
全島農場總數
Source: USDA NASS, 2023 Census of Agriculture — Guam
−47%
Avg. Farm Size (vs. 2018)
平均農場縮減幅度
From 9.2 acres (2018) → 4.9 acres (2023) · USDA NASS

Critical Import Dependency: Over 90% of Guam's fresh produce and daily groceries are sourced externally — primarily from the U.S. mainland and Japan. High maritime shipping costs and prolonged transit times mean that leafy greens arriving at local supermarkets have already lost a significant portion of their freshness and nutritional value.

高度仰賴進口：關島超過 90% 的新鮮蔬果與日常食品仰賴外部輸入（主要來自美國本土與日本），物流海運成本高昂，進口葉菜送達當地超市時新鮮度已大幅遞減。

Sources: University of Guam Center for Island Sustainability Food Security Research · farmingIQ (Mar. 2026) · Port Authority of Guam — Facts and Figures

Farmland Shrinkage & the Small-Farm Bottleneck: According to the USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service 2023 Census of Agriculture (released April 2025), the total number of farms on Guam grew 121% to 583 — yet average farm size collapsed by 47%, falling from 9.2 acres (2018) to just 4.9 acres. This paradox signals that traditional large-scale open-field cultivation faces severe structural barriers, while the market urgently needs high-density, high-yield intensive indoor farming solutions.

耕地縮減與小農化瓶頸：根據美國農業部 NASS 最新發布的 2023 年關島農業普查（2025 年 4 月公布），全島農場總數雖大幅增至 583 家，但平均農場規模卻縮減了 47%（僅剩 4.9 英畝）。此矛盾現象顯示，傳統大面積露地種植面臨嚴重結構性瓶頸，市場急需高密度、高坪效的密集型室內農業解決方案。

Source: USDA NASS — Guam Agriculture: Results from the 2023 Census of Agriculture (ACH22-25, April 2025)

Extreme Weather & Climate Normalization of Disaster: Guam is routinely struck by typhoons, tropical cyclones, and seasonal heavy rain. Soil salinization and waterlogging regularly destroy traditional outdoor crops, making dependable planned production impossible through conventional agriculture alone.

極端氣候與天災常態化：關島常年受颱風、熱帶氣旋及季節性暴雨肆虐，土壤鹽化與水分飽和常導致傳統戶外作物全毀，傳統農業無法實現穩定可靠的「計畫性生產」。

02
Core Solution: Plant Island Ark System
核心方案：植樂方舟量產級智慧種植系統

To address these structural challenges, this project proposes that GNW introduce the Plant Island Ark — a modular, production-grade smart hydroponic growing system developed by Sheng-Future Co., Ltd. (Taiwan) — to establish Guam's first typhoon-resilient, high-output smart vertical farming demonstration base.

針對上述痛點，本專案建議由 GNW 引進台灣盛富創研所研發的「植樂方舟（Plant Island Ark）」量產級積木式智慧種植機，在關島建置首座具備抗災、高產能特性的智慧垂直農業示範基地。

  • Production-Grade Indoor Hydroponics / 量產級室內水耕系統 Fully soil-free and pesticide-free. Enables reliable, scheduled mass production. Compatible with idle spaces, school classrooms, warehouses, shipping containers, offices, and restaurants. 全面擺脫土壤與農藥依賴，能有效、可靠地進行計畫性量產。適用於閒置空間、學校教室、空廠房、貨櫃、辦公室及餐館等各種封閉場所。
  • 5-Layer Vertical Stacking vs. Conventional Plant Factories / 5 層垂直堆疊，突破傳統植物工廠框架 Conventional plant factories enable indoor mass production, but carry three fundamental constraints: prohibitive initial capital investment running into the millions of USD, shared-row irrigation systems where a single infected plant can wipe out an entire row, and reliance on specialist agronomists for daily operations. The Plant Island Ark breaks all three barriers — up to 5-tier vertical stacking, fully independent water circulation per unit (containing any infection to a single box), one-tap APP operation requiring no professional expertise, and flexible deployment across any indoor space at a fraction of the cost of a traditional plant factory. 傳統植物工廠雖能實現室內量產，卻面臨三大先天限制：初期建置成本動輒數百萬美金起跳、種植盤採整列共用水路設計（一株感染、整列報廢）、且需仰賴專業農業技術人員日常維運。植樂方舟以「積木式單體」設計徹底打破這些瓶頸——最高可垂直堆疊 5 層、每一箱體皆為完全獨立的水循環系統（單體感染不擴散）、APP 一鍵操作無需專業背景，且可靈活部署於各類閒置空間，初期投資門檻遠低於傳統植物工廠。
  • Turnkey Complete Solution / 一站式完整配套方案 Includes growing units, nutrient solutions, seeds, planting cups, accessories, technical guidance, app-based management back-end, installation engineering (plumbing, electrical, framing), and automation. 提供主機箱體、營養液、種子、定植杯/海綿、作業配件、水耕技術指導、APP 管理後台、架設工程（水電、架體）及自動化工程的完整配套。
  • Local Low-Cost Quick Assembly / 在地低工本快速組裝 Highly modular design: local labor crews in Guam need only complete basic plumbing and electrical connections to bring the system online — drastically reducing barriers to entry and eliminating the need for expensive cross-border engineering personnel. 系統高度模組化，當地工班僅需「接水、接電」即可立刻投入運作，大幅降低初期導入壁壘與跨境工程成本。
Supported Crop Varieties 可種菜種一覽

The Plant Island Ark system supports a broad spectrum of crops across three categories — all grown pesticide-free, soil-free, and harvestable year-round regardless of Guam's weather conditions.

植樂方舟系統相容以下三大類菜種，全年候無農藥、無土種植，不受關島天候影響穩定產出。

03
Technology Advantages vs. Guam Pain Points
技術優勢與關島痛點對接矩陣

The Plant Island Ark was engineered with island operating environments in mind. Each feature directly resolves a documented bottleneck facing Guam's agricultural ecosystem.

植樂方舟的每一項技術特性均直接對應關島農業生態的具體瓶頸，專為島嶼型運作環境而設計。

Guam Pain Point
關島農業痛點		 Plant Island Ark Solution
植樂方舟技術對策
High island electricity costs
高昂的海島電費成本 		Auto-adjusting LED height & intensity — Unlike conventional plant factories with fixed full-brightness LEDs, this system uses Taiwan-exclusive technology to automatically adjust lamp distance and brightness according to each crop's growth stage. LEDs never need to run at full power continuously, delivering significant energy savings.
LED 自動調整高度與亮度：擁有台灣獨家技術，能依植株生長階段自動調整光照距離與亮度，無需全亮運作，大幅降低電力消耗。
High-risk external pathogen introduction
高風險的外來病蟲害 		Single-unit self-contained circulation, zero cross-contamination — Each unit operates as a fully independent nutrient-solution loop. Different plants' secreted enzymes cannot interfere with each other. If one unit is infected, the disease is contained within that single box and cannot spread to adjacent machines.
單體自循環零交叉感染：各單體皆為獨立養液循環系統，若單一單體感染，絕不擴散至其他機台。
Shortage of high-quality fresh salad greens
高品質新鮮沙拉葉菜短缺 		Production-grade high capacity — Each unit can grow 25 heads of butterhead lettuce or accommodate 85 baby-green planting sites. Output volume is incomparable to typical small-scale domestic products, enabling stable local supply.
量產級大產能：單箱可種結球萵苣 25 顆或 Baby 菜 85 穴，遠超一般家用小型產品，能穩定就地供應。
Time-consuming traditional cleaning; spill risk
傳統清理耗時且易溢水 		Auto-drain & pull-out water tank — Built-in automatic drainage. The water tank can be pulled out for cleaning without water spillage when full. Significantly reduces maintenance burden and ensures workplace safety.
自動排水 + 可抽拉清洗水槽：自動排水功能，水槽可抽拉清潔，不因滿水位拖出時溢水汙染環境或造成危險。
Lack of professional hydroponic agronomists
缺乏專業水耕農業技術人員 		One-tap smart growing via APP — Networked management back-end with mobile app. Built-in growth parameters for each crop variety. After transplanting, simply select the crop icon to automatically activate: light adjustment, nutrient cycling, auto top-up, oxygenation, and air circulation (simulating natural wind to strengthen stems).
APP 一鍵智慧種植：連網後台搭配手機 APP，定植後點選品種圖示即自動運作光照升降、養液循環、自動補液、增氧、風吹等智慧種植系統。
04
High-Value Commercial Model: Medical Cannabis
殺手級高價值商模：小株藥用大麻
⚑ Historic Regulatory Milestone 關鍵法規里程碑

On February 26, 2026, the Guam Cannabis Control Board (CCB) unanimously approved the island's first two commercial cultivation licenses — Pacific Root LLC (dba Pacific Cultivation) received full approval, and Guam Real Deal LLC (dba Deep Green Guam) received conditional approval. Seven years after Guam legalized adult-use recreational cannabis, this marks the formal opening of the commercial cultivation market.

2026 年 2 月 26 日，關島大麻管制局（CCB）正式核發首批兩張商業種植執照，包含批准 Pacific Root LLC（以 Pacific Cultivation 名義營業）的種植許可，以及有條件批准 Guam Real Deal LLC（以 Deep Green Guam 名義營業）。這項合規里程碑宣告關島高價值經濟作物的室內精準種植市場正迎來黃金爆發期。

Source: Isla Public, Feb. 25, 2026 — Guam's First Cannabis Establishment Licenses Approved · CCB Official: guamtax.com/ccb

Why Plant Island Ark Is the Ideal Cannabis Cultivation Platform

為何植樂方舟是大麻精準種植的理想平台

① Zero Cross-Contamination — The Ultimate Asset Insurance for High-Value Crops

大麻屬極高價值經濟作物，傳統水耕多採整層單一水槽大循環模組，一旦根腐病、細菌或病毒入侵，整批作物將面臨全數銷毀的毀滅性損失。植樂方舟的「單體自循環系統」確保感染絕對不會跨機擴散，將種植風險死死鎖在單一箱體內，是關島大麻投資客的最核心資產保障機制。

Cannabis is an extremely high-value crop. Traditional hydroponic systems typically use shared large-tank circulation modules for an entire row. If root rot, bacteria, or a virus enters the water supply, the entire batch faces catastrophic total loss. The Plant Island Ark's single-unit self-circulation architecture ensures that infection is absolutely contained within one box, functioning as the ultimate asset insurance mechanism for cannabis investors in Guam.

② Independent "Micro-Climate Labs" — Multi-Variety Precision Cultivation at Scale

大麻在不同生長階段對光照、水分、含氧量與養分需求極其嚴格。植樂方舟的 APP 智慧系統使同一空間內每台單機都能化身獨立「微氣候實驗室」，同時進行多品種、多階段的精準參數微調與計畫性生產，互不干擾。

Cannabis has exceptionally precise and unique requirements for light distance, intensity, moisture, oxygenation, and nutrients at each growth stage. The Plant Island Ark's app-based smart system allows each individual unit within the same container or factory space to function as an independent "micro-climate laboratory," enabling simultaneous multi-variety, multi-stage precision cultivation without mutual interference.

③ Maximum Space ROI + Energy Efficiency — Overcoming Guam's High Operating Costs

系統最高垂直堆疊 5 層，能將關島閒置廠房的空間價值發揮至極致。搭配台灣獨家 LED 自動調光技術，無需常態全亮，大幅壓縮高昂的島嶼電費，確保極高投資回報率（ROI）。

Up to 5-tier vertical stacking maximizes the spatial value of idle Guam warehouse space. Combined with Taiwan-exclusive auto-dimming LED technology eliminating constant full-brightness operation, this architecture dramatically reduces high island electricity costs and ensures superior ROI.
05
Production Capacity & Commercial Valuation
產能評估與量化商業價值

Based on the Plant Island Ark's unit dimensions (900 × 774 × 582 mm) and validated yield data, we have conducted precise spatial configuration and quantified output estimates for three deployment scenarios: a 40ft high-cube container farm (Plan A), a 10-ping indoor space (Plan B), and a future medical cannabis configuration (Plan C — pending field trials).

根據植樂方舟單機尺寸（900 × 774 × 582 mm）與實測產量數據，我們針對三種部署方案進行精確的空間配置與量化產能估算：方案 A（40 呎高貨櫃農場）、方案 B（10 坪室內空間）、方案 C（藥用大麻客製機台，待實地測試）。

Plan A — 40ft High-Cube Container Farm (Demonstration Base)
方案 A：40 呎高貨櫃農場（示意圖）

Inside a standard 40ft high-cube container (interior height ~2.7m), with 1.2m reserved at the rear for mechanical/utility room. The remaining length accommodates 12 units per side. Left-right double row × 3-tier stacking (height-limited) = 72 Plant Island Ark units per container. A ~1.2m central aisle facilitates pull-out tank cleaning operations.

扣除後方 1.2 米獨立機房工程空間，其餘長度可排列 12 台單機。左右雙排、垂直堆疊 3 層（受限貨櫃高度），共搭載 72 台植樂方舟。貨櫃中央保留近 1.2 米寬敞作業走道。

72
units / 台
Total machines
機台總數
93.6
KG / cycle
Green Flame Lettuce
綠火焰萵苣（每期）
288
KG / cycle
Baby Bok Choy
奶油小白菜（每期）
Plan B — Flexible Indoor Vertical Stacking: 10-Ping Space as Reference (Ultimate 5-Tier)
室內空間自由堆疊方案：以 10 坪室內空間為例（極致 5 層堆疊）

When deployed in Guam's idle factories, vacant classrooms, or unfinished buildings, leveraging the system's maximum 5-tier vertical stacking capability, just 10 ping (~33 m²) of floor space can accommodate up to 60 units. This plan improves spatial yield by 66% over standard 3-tier configurations.

利用系統最高可垂直堆疊 5 層的技術優勢，僅需 10 坪（約 33 平方公尺）的地面面積即可部署高達 60 台單機，比常規 3 層堆疊大幅提升 66% 的空間產值。

06
USDA Federal Funding Strategy
美國農業部（USDA）聯邦補助資金爭取策略

Given GNW's strong high-level connections with USDA's Pacific region leadership — and the fact that cannabis remains a controlled substance at the federal level — this project proposes a compliant dual-track strategy: apply for federal grants for pure vegetable production, while deploying private capital to leverage the cannabis opportunity.

鑑於 GNW 與美國農業部（USDA）太平洋區負責人擁有深厚的高層人脈，且大麻在聯邦層級仍屬管制物質，本專案建議 GNW 採取「純蔬菜申報補助，自有資金槓桿大麻」的合規雙軌戰略。

① USDA Micro-Grants for Food Security Program (MGFSP)

Authorized under the 2018 Farm Bill (7 U.S.C. § 7518), USDA's Agricultural Marketing Service (AMS) established MGFSP specifically for territories with high food import dependency — including Guam. Approximately $5.3 million is available. Hydroponic and aeroponic farming systems are explicitly confirmed as eligible by the official USDA FAQ. GNW can apply for the entire 40ft container farm under the declaration of "100% production of Green Flame Lettuce and Baby Bok Choy to improve Guam's food self-sufficiency," positioning this project at the highest priority tier for federal funding.

依據 2018 年農業法案（公法 115-343）授權，USDA 農業行銷局專為關島等食品高度依賴進口的群島地區設立本補助計畫，約 530 萬美元可供申請。官方 FAQ 已明確確認水耕（Hydroponic）與氣霧耕系統符合資格。GNW 可全額以「100% 生產綠火焰萵苣與奶油小白菜以提升關島糧食自給率」的名義申報，可取得最高優先級聯邦資金補貼。

Source: USDA AMS MGFSP FAQ — Hydroponics confirmed eligible · Apply: ams.usda.gov/services/grants/mgfsp/apply · Funding announcement: $5.3M announcement

② USDA Local Food Purchase Assistance (LFPA) Cooperative Agreement

USDA has entered into a Local Food Purchase Assistance (LFPA) cooperative agreement with the Government of Guam, under which the government allocates budget to procure locally produced fresh food for supply chain resilience. The pesticide-free, nutrient-rich vegetables produced by this project can be directly purchased at guaranteed prices by the government program and distributed to local residents — ensuring stable baseline revenue from the very first phase of the project.

USDA 近年與關島政府簽署了 LFPA 合作協議，旨在由政府編列預算收購在地新鮮食物以提高供應鏈韌性。本計畫產出的無毒健康蔬菜，可由政府項目直接保價收購並分發給在地基層，在專案起始階段即確保穩定的基礎營收。

Source: USDA AMS Press Release — USDA Announces Guam Signs LFPA Cooperative Agreement

Dual-Track Capital Strategy · 雙軌資金槓桿策略

By securing USDA grant funding, GNW can complete the container infrastructure, local plumbing/electrical installation, and initial machine procurement at minimal cost. The resulting capital savings can then be deployed to apply for a Cannabis Establishment License from the Guam Cannabis Control Board (CCB). It is important to note that cannabis cultivation requires a customized, larger-format version of the Plant Island Ark unit — purpose-built to accommodate the greater plant size and canopy volume of cannabis. The core system architecture, technology platform, and smart management back-end remain fully consistent with the standard units, ensuring a smooth transition and shared operational expertise between the vegetable and cannabis operations.

透過 USDA 補助金的挹注，GNW 可以極低成本完成貨櫃基礎設施、在地水電工程與首批主機導入。隨後，GNW 可運用省下來的自有資本，向關島大麻管制局（CCB）申請商業種植許可。需特別說明的是，大麻種植因植株較大，需採用植樂方舟的客製化大尺寸機台版本，以配合大麻植株較大的樹形與冠層體積。但系統的核心架構、技術平台與 APP 智慧管理後台與標準蔬菜機台完全一致，確保蔬菜與大麻兩條生產線之間能夠順暢銜接、共享操作技術與管理經驗，將聯邦政策資金轉化為高回報的商業槓桿。

07
Conclusion & Next Steps
結論與下一階段推進

The Plant Island Ark is more than a hydroponic apparatus — it is a complete planned-production solution that helps Guam address climate change, improve food self-sufficiency, and meet corporate ESG sustainability goals simultaneously. Leveraging GNW's political and commercial influence in Guam, once the first-phase "container / indoor demonstration base" is successfully established, the model can rapidly replicate as a standard module across Guam — generating significant island green economy and social sustainability value.

「植樂方舟」不僅是一套水耕設備，更是一套能協助關島應對氣候變遷、提升糧食自給率並兼顧企業 ESG 永續目標的完整計畫性量產方案。透過 GNW 在關島當地的政治與商業影響力，本專案在第一階段成功打造示範基地後，未來將快速複製推廣，創造巨大的島嶼綠色經濟與社會永續價值。

Proposed Immediate Next Steps 建議立即推進事項

安排雙方技術說明會

GNW initiates USDA MGFSP grant application via Guam Dept. of Agriculture

場地勘察：確認候選貨櫃／廠房位置

GNW initiates CCB cannabis establishment license application
GNW 向關島 CCB 啟動大麻種植執照申請
05
Finalize Phase 1 equipment quantity, specs & commercial terms
確認第一期設備數量、規格與商業條款
